use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF DUCHENNE MUSCULAR DYSTROPHY (DMD) IN PATIENTS HAVING A CONFIRMED MUTATION OF THE DMD GENE THAT IS AMENABLE TO EXON 53 SKIPPING

indications.text:
VYONDYS 53 is indicated for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) in
patients who have a confirmed mutation of the DMD gene that is amenable to exon 53 skipping.
This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on an increase in dystrophin
production in skeletal muscle obser...
